herbal_remedies: Ginger tea with honey and lemon
diet_recommendations: Drink warm fluids frequently. Avoid cold foods and beverages. Eat light khichdi or rasam rice. Include turmeric milk (Haldi Doodh) before bed.
lifestyle_recommendations: Rest adequately. Keep warm. Do steam inhalation 2-3 times daily. Gargle with warm salt water.

herbal_remedies: Ginger juice with honey (1 tsp each, twice daily)
diet_recommendations: Avoid fried and oily foods. Drink warm water throughout the day. Have warm soups and broths.
lifestyle_recommendations: Avoid cold air exposure. Use a humidifier. Elevate head while sleeping. Avoid smoking and dusty environments.

diet_recommendations: Eat light, easily digestible food like moong dal khichdi. Stay hydrated with warm fluids. Avoid heavy and spicy food.
lifestyle_recommendations: Complete bed rest. Apply wet cloth on forehead. Drink plenty of fluids. Monitor temperature regularly.

herbal_remedies: Clove powder paste with salt applied to forehead
diet_recommendations: Stay hydrated. Avoid caffeine withdrawal. Eat regular meals. Include magnesium-rich foods like almonds and spinach.
lifestyle_recommendations: Rest in a dark quiet room. Practice deep breathing. Avoid screen exposure. Apply cold compress on forehead.

herbal_remedies: Ajwain (Carom seeds) with black salt and warm water
diet_recommendations: Eat small frequent meals. Avoid heavy oily food. Include buttermilk (chaas) with cumin. Eat ripe bananas.
lifestyle_recommendations: Walk for 15 minutes after meals. Avoid lying down immediately after eating. Practice Vajrasana after food.

diet_recommendations: Avoid spicy, fried, and citrus foods. Eat smaller meals. Include cooling foods like cucumber and coconut water.
lifestyle_recommendations: Don't lie down within 2 hours of eating. Elevate head while sleeping. Reduce stress. Avoid carbonated drinks.

herbal_remedies: Triphala powder with warm water at bedtime
Castor oil (1 tsp with warm milk)
diet_recommendations: Increase fiber intake with fruits and vegetables. Drink 8-10 glasses of warm water daily. Eat papaya and prunes.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise regularly. Establish regular bowel habits. Don't suppress urges. Walk for 30 minutes daily.

diet_recommendations: Follow BRAT diet (Banana, Rice, Apple, Toast). Drink ORS or lemon-salt-sugar water. Avoid dairy except curd.
lifestyle_recommendations: Rest adequately. Maintain hygiene. Drink boiled and cooled water. Avoid outside food.

diet_recommendations: Drink warm fluids. Eat soft foods. Avoid cold and sour foods. Include honey in warm water.
lifestyle_recommendations: Rest your voice. Use a humidifier. Avoid irritants like smoke. Keep throat warm with a scarf.

herbal_remedies: Warm sesame oil massage with garlic
Turmeric and ginger paste applied externally
diet_recommendations: Include anti-inflammatory foods like turmeric and ginger. Eat omega-3 rich foods. Avoid processed foods and excess salt.
lifestyle_recommendations: Do gentle exercises and stretching. Apply warm compress. Maintain healthy weight. Practice yoga (Surya Namaskar).

diet_recommendations: Avoid spicy and fermented foods. Drink plenty of water. Include blood-purifying foods like bitter gourd. Eat fresh fruits.
lifestyle_recommendations: Wear loose cotton clothing. Avoid harsh soaps. Keep skin moisturized. Bathe with neem water.

herbal_remedies: Ashwagandha powder with milk at bedtime
diet_recommendations: Avoid caffeine after 2 PM. Eat light dinner. Include tryptophan-rich foods like milk and bananas. Avoid heavy meals at night.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain fixed sleep schedule. Avoid screens 1 hour before bed. Practice meditation. Massage feet with warm sesame oil.

herbal_remedies: Fenugreek seeds soaked overnight (chew in morning)
diet_recommendations: Control carbohydrate intake. Eat high-fiber foods. Include bitter foods. Avoid sugar and refined flour. Eat small frequent meals.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise daily for 30-45 minutes. Monitor blood sugar regularly. Manage stress. Walk after every meal.

diet_recommendations: Reduce salt intake (under 5g/day). Eat potassium-rich foods like bananas and spinach. Follow DASH diet principles.
lifestyle_recommendations: Practice pranayama and meditation. Exercise regularly. Reduce stress. Avoid smoking and excess alcohol.

diet_recommendations: Eat sattvic diet (fresh, light). Avoid caffeine and stimulants. Include nuts, seeds, and warm milk. Eat regular meals.
lifestyle_recommendations: Practice Pranayama (Anulom Vilom). Do meditation daily. Exercise regularly. Maintain a journal. Limit screen time.

herbal_remedies: Nasya with Anu Taila (nasal oil drops)
diet_recommendations: Avoid cold foods and drinks. Include warm spices in diet. Drink warm water throughout day. Avoid dairy if mucus is excessive.
lifestyle_recommendations: Use a neti pot with saline water. Avoid allergens (dust, pollen). Keep home clean. Practice Pranayama.

herbal_remedies: Honey with black pepper and ginger juice
diet_recommendations: Avoid cold and heavy foods. Eat light warm meals. Include garlic and onion in cooking. Avoid dairy if triggering.
lifestyle_recommendations: Practice Pranayama (Bhastrika). Avoid smoke and pollution. Keep rescue inhaler accessible. Regular breathing exercises.

diet_recommendations: Drink 3-4 liters of water daily. Avoid spicy and caffeinated drinks. Include cucumber and watermelon. Drink buttermilk.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain hygiene. Don't hold urine. Wear cotton undergarments. Wash with warm water.

diet_recommendations: Eat iron-rich foods: spinach, beetroot, dates, jaggery, pomegranate. Combine with Vitamin C for absorption. Avoid tea with meals.
lifestyle_recommendations: Cook in iron utensils. Get adequate rest. Avoid strenuous activity until hemoglobin improves.

herbal_remedies: Warm sesame oil massage on lower abdomen
diet_recommendations: Eat warm, easily digestible foods. Include iron-rich foods. Avoid cold and raw foods during periods. Drink warm water.
lifestyle_recommendations: Apply warm compress on abdomen. Do gentle yoga (Baddha Konasana). Rest adequately. Avoid heavy exercise.

diet_recommendations: Eat protein-rich diet. Include biotin-rich foods (eggs, nuts). Eat iron and zinc-rich foods. Stay hydrated.
lifestyle_recommendations: Oil massage scalp twice a week. Avoid harsh chemical shampoos. Reduce stress. Avoid tight hairstyles.

herbal_remedies: Rose water eye drops (2 drops in each eye)
diet_recommendations: Eat carrots, sweet potatoes, and green leafy vegetables. Include Vitamin A-rich foods. Eat almonds and walnuts.
lifestyle_recommendations: Follow 20-20-20 rule (every 20 min, look 20 feet away for 20 sec). Blink frequently. Reduce screen brightness.

herbal_remedies: Warm lemon and honey water in morning
Apple cider vinegar with water before meals
diet_recommendations: Eat mindfully and in moderation. Increase vegetables and fiber. Avoid processed and sugary foods. Eat biggest meal at lunch.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise 45-60 minutes daily. Practice Surya Namaskar. Walk after meals. Sleep 7-8 hours. Manage stress.

herbal_remedies: Clove oil applied directly to tooth
diet_recommendations: Avoid very hot or cold foods. Eat soft foods. Avoid sugary and acidic foods. Include calcium-rich foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain oral hygiene. Use neem or babool datun. Rinse mouth after every meal. Visit dentist if pain persists.

herbal_remedies: Warm sitz bath with neem leaves
Buttermilk with rock salt and cumin
diet_recommendations: Eat high-fiber diet. Drink plenty of water. Include papaya, figs, and leafy greens. Avoid spicy and fried foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Avoid sitting for long periods. Do Kegel exercises. Take warm sitz baths. Don't strain during bowel movements.

diet_recommendations: Include anti-inflammatory foods. Eat calcium and Vitamin D rich foods. Avoid inflammatory foods like refined sugar.
lifestyle_recommendations: Do gentle yoga (Cat-Cow, Child's Pose). Maintain good posture. Sleep on firm mattress. Apply warm compress.

diet_recommendations: Eat balanced sattvic diet. Include seasonal fruits and vegetables. Add garlic, ginger, turmeric to cooking. Eat probiotic foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise regularly. Get adequate sleep (7-8 hrs). Practice Pranayama. Manage stress. Get sunlight exposure.

diet_recommendations: Avoid spicy, hot, and acidic foods. Eat cooling foods like cucumber and yogurt. Include Vitamin B and iron-rich foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain oral hygiene. Avoid toothpaste with SLS. Reduce stress. Rinse with warm salt water.

diet_recommendations: Eat zinc and B-vitamin rich foods. Include omega-3 fatty acids. Stay hydrated. Reduce sugar intake.
lifestyle_recommendations: Wash hair regularly with mild shampoo. Avoid hot water on scalp. Reduce stress. Oil scalp regularly.

herbal_remedies: Warm mustard oil drops (2 drops in affected ear)
Garlic oil ear drops (garlic cooked in sesame oil)
diet_recommendations: Stay hydrated. Avoid dairy if prone to ear infections. Include anti-inflammatory foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Keep ears dry. Don't insert objects in ear. Use warm compress. Consult doctor if discharge is present.

diet_recommendations: Include iodine-rich foods (iodized salt, seaweed). Eat selenium-rich foods (Brazil nuts). Include zinc-rich foods. Limit goitrogens (raw cruciferous vegetables).
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise regularly. Practice yoga (Sarvangasana, Halasana). Manage stress. Get regular thyroid check-ups.

diet_recommendations: Drink 3-4 liters of water daily. Limit oxalate-rich foods (spinach, chocolate). Reduce salt intake. Include citrus fruits.
lifestyle_recommendations: Stay well hydrated. Exercise regularly. Avoid holding urine. Limit protein and sodium intake.

diet_recommendations: Drink warm fluids. Avoid cold and dairy products. Include spicy foods like pepper and ginger. Eat light warm meals.
lifestyle_recommendations: Do Jal Neti (nasal irrigation) daily. Steam inhalation twice daily. Elevate head while sleeping. Avoid cold environments.

diet_recommendations: Eat small frequent meals. Avoid spicy, fried, and sour foods. Include cooling foods. Drink buttermilk with cumin.
lifestyle_recommendations: Eat meals at regular times. Avoid alcohol and NSAIDs. Manage stress. Don't skip meals. Avoid smoking.

diet_recommendations: Avoid trigger foods (dairy, gluten if sensitive). Eat anti-inflammatory foods. Include omega-3 fatty acids. Stay hydrated.
lifestyle_recommendations: Moisturize skin regularly. Wear soft cotton clothing. Avoid harsh soaps. Bathe in lukewarm (not hot) water.

diet_recommendations: Stay hydrated. Avoid excess salt. Eat iron-rich foods. Include vitamin B6-rich foods like bananas.
lifestyle_recommendations: Move slowly when changing positions. Do balance exercises. Avoid sudden head movements. Sleep with head elevated.

herbal_remedies: Garlic clove daily on empty stomach
diet_recommendations: Reduce saturated fats. Include fiber-rich foods. Eat oats and whole grains. Include omega-3 fatty acids. Use olive oil.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise 30-45 minutes daily. Maintain healthy weight. Avoid smoking. Reduce alcohol. Practice stress management.

diet_recommendations: Eat light, easily digestible food. Include sugarcane juice and radish. Avoid oily, fried, and heavy foods. Eat fresh fruits.
lifestyle_recommendations: Complete bed rest. Avoid alcohol completely. Drink plenty of fluids. Get regular liver function tests.

herbal_remedies: Papaya leaf juice (most effective for platelet count)
diet_recommendations: Stay extremely hydrated. Drink coconut water, lemon water, and ORS. Eat protein-rich and nutritious food. Avoid oily food.
lifestyle_recommendations: Complete bed rest. Monitor platelet count daily. Use mosquito nets and repellents. Seek medical attention if platelets drop below 40,000.

diet_recommendations: Follow low-glycemic diet. Include anti-inflammatory foods. Avoid processed and sugary foods. Eat complex carbs and lean protein.
lifestyle_recommendations: Exercise regularly (yoga, walking). Manage stress. Get 7-8 hours sleep. Maintain healthy weight. Track menstrual cycle.

diet_recommendations: Identify and avoid trigger foods (cheese, chocolate, caffeine, alcohol). Stay hydrated. Eat regular meals. Include magnesium-rich foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain sleep schedule. Manage stress. Avoid bright lights and loud sounds during attack. Rest in dark quiet room.

diet_recommendations: Eat protein-rich food for healing. Stay hydrated. Include Vitamin C-rich foods. Eat fruits and vegetables.
lifestyle_recommendations: Cool burn under running water for 10 minutes. Don't pop blisters. Keep wound clean. Seek medical help for severe burns.

herbal_remedies: Neem leaf juice on empty stomach
diet_recommendations: Eat pumpkin seeds. Include garlic and carrots. Avoid sugary foods. Eat pomegranate on empty stomach.
lifestyle_recommendations: Maintain hand hygiene. Wash vegetables thoroughly. Drink boiled water. Trim nails regularly. Deworm every 6 months.

herbal_remedies: Aloe vera juice on empty stomach
diet_recommendations: Eat light food. Avoid alcohol completely. Include bitter vegetables. Eat fresh fruits and vegetables. Avoid fried and fatty foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Avoid alcohol and smoking. Exercise regularly. Get adequate rest. Monitor liver function regularly.

herbal_remedies: Rose water drops (2 drops per eye)
diet_recommendations: Eat Vitamin A-rich foods. Include green leafy vegetables. Stay hydrated. Avoid spicy and sour foods.
lifestyle_recommendations: Don't touch or rub eyes. Wash hands frequently. Use separate towels. Avoid sharing eye cosmetics. Wear sunglasses.

diet_recommendations: Eat warm, soft foods only. Drink warm fluids. Avoid cold, spicy, and crunchy foods. Include turmeric milk.
lifestyle_recommendations: Rest your voice. Gargle frequently. Stay warm. Breathe through nose, not mouth.

herbal_remedies: Tea tree oil with coconut oil
diet_recommendations: Avoid sugar and yeast-containing foods. Eat probiotic foods like yogurt. Include garlic in diet. Stay hydrated.
lifestyle_recommendations: Keep affected area dry. Wear loose cotton clothing. Don't share personal items. Maintain good hygiene.

herbal_remedies: ORS (Oral Rehydration Solution) homemade: salt, sugar, lemon in water
diet_recommendations: Drink water frequently in small sips. Eat water-rich fruits. Include electrolyte drinks. Avoid caffeine and alcohol.
lifestyle_recommendations: Drink water before feeling thirsty. Carry water bottle always. Avoid excessive sun exposure. Rest in cool place.
